goal: Visit the public Finextra news page and extract up to 5 latest visible finance market articles. Return only finance market signals. For each article, extract title, summary, published timestamp, article URL, signal type, market category, severity, mentioned companies when explicit, and explicit regions when explicit. Do not invent companies or regions.
goal_prompt:
Visit the public Finextra news page and extract up to 5 latest visible finance market articles. Return only finance market signals. For each article, extract title, summary, published timestamp, article URL, signal type, market category, severity, mentioned companies when explicit, and explicit regions when explicit. Do not invent companies or regions.

Return only structured JSON that matches this schema exactly:
{"type":"object","required":["captured_at","articles","metrics","map_points"],"properties":{"captured_at":{"type":"string"},"articles":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["title","summary","published_at","article_url","signal_type","market_category","severity"],"properties":{"title":{"type":"string"},"summary":{"type":"string"},"published_at":{"type":"string"},"article_url":{"type":"string"},"signal_type":{"type":"string"},"market_category":{"type":"string"},"severity":{"type":"string"},"companies":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"regions":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}}}},"metrics":{"type":"object","required":["story_count"],"properties":{"story_count":{"type":"number"}}},"map_points":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["latitude","longitude","entity_name","signal_type","severity","timestamp","explanation"],"properties":{"latitude":{"type":"number"},"longitude":{"type":"number"},"entity_name":{"type":"string"},"signal_type":{"type":"string"},"severity":{"type":"string"},"timestamp":{"type":"string"},"explanation":{"type":"string"},"cluster_key":{"type":"string"}}}}}}

Stop conditions:
["Stop after 5 visible articles are extracted.","Stop when the first page has been fully parsed and no new article cards remain.","Stop after two consecutive page parsing failures."]

Structured error handling rules:
{"timeout":{"action":"retry","max_retries":2,"emit_status":"failed"},"layout_changed":{"action":"store_raw_payload","emit_status":"failed"},"schema_validation_failed":{"action":"store_raw_payload","emit_status":"validation_error"}}
stop_conditions: Stop after 5 visible articles are extracted.
Stop when the first page has been fully parsed and no new article cards remain.
Stop after two consecutive page parsing failures.

articles.title: Nyse parent invests $600m in Polymarket
articles.summary: Nyse owner Intercontinental Exchange is doubling down on its bet on the growing popularity of prediction markets by investing $600 million in Polymarket.

articles.title: EU, UK and Switzerland issue T+1 testing plan ahead of joint move on 11 October 2027
articles.summary: In collaboration, the EU T+1 Industry Committee (IC), UK Accelerated Settlement Taskforce (AST) and Swiss Securities Post-Trade Council (swissSPTC) have outlined logistics and timelines, testing touchpoints and scenarios for the transition to T+1 settlement.

articles.title: ECB board member calls for digital euro
articles.summary: ECB board member Piero Cipollone states that for tokenisation to take off in Europe, there needs to be more interoperability between DLT systems, a centralised settlement mechanism, and a central bank digital currency (CBDC).

articles.title: VC investors call on EC to promote quantum computing
articles.summary: The European Commission (EC) must encourage more private capital investment in quantum computing startups if the region is going to compete with China and the US in the development of new technology.

articles.title: Talos and Nasdaq forge path to managing both on- and off-chain collateral workflow
articles.summary: Talos is to connect its digital asset infrastructure with Nasdaq's Calypso and trade surveillance platforms to develop a unified 'single lens' for managing tokenized collateral.

map_points.explanation: Intercontinental Exchange (owner of NYSE) invests $600m in Polymarket to bet on prediction markets.
EU, UK, and Switzerland release a joint testing plan for the transition to T+1 settlement by 2027.
ECB official calls for a digital euro and DLT interoperability to support financial tokenisation in Europe.
VC investors urge the EC to increase private investment in quantum computing to remain competitive.
Nasdaq partners with Talos to integrate digital asset infrastructure with traditional collateral management workflows.
